zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏多整理格局
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD维持窄幅震荡走势，价格围绕6.77附近运行，整体重心略微上移，短线多空博弈激烈，但未出现明显方向突破信号，整体仍偏震荡上行

MACD指标维持轻微正值，动能柱逐步收敛但仍在零轴上方，显示多头力量占优；均线结构上价格站上SMA20，短期趋势略偏多

下方关键支撑位关注6.7170及6.65区域，若跌破SMA20或引发回调；上方阻力集中于6.78及前高6.7814，突破需量能配合

操作策略上建议维持区间交易思路，未有效突破6.78前以低吸高抛为主，激进者可在回踩6.71附近分批布局多单，止损控制在6.65下方

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently consolidating in a tight intraday range after a modest 0.16% advance, reflecting a market in equilibrium rather than a directional breakout. Price action remains pinned near recent highs, indicating mild bullish pressure but lacking strong momentum. The structure suggests a short-term sideways-to-slightly-bullish trend, with buyers gradually defending higher lows above the 20-period SMA, while sellers repeatedly cap upside attempts near recent intraday highs.

The 20-period SMA at 6.71710 acts as a dynamic support and confirms a short-term bullish bias as price trades above it. The MACD reading at 0.0214 suggests emerging upward momentum, though the absence of a signal line reading limits confirmation strength. With RSI unavailable, momentum assessment relies more heavily on price structure, which still favors consolidation with a slight upward drift rather than an impulsive trend continuation.

Immediate resistance is clustered around 6.7814, which aligns closely with the recent 24h high and acts as a near-term ceiling. A sustained breakout above this level could open the path toward 6.80 and potentially 6.90. On the downside, initial support sits near 6.7514, followed by stronger structural support at the 20-SMA around 6.71710, with a deeper invalidation zone near 6.70 if selling pressure accelerates.

Trading conditions favor range-based strategies given low volatility. Traders may consider buying dips toward 6.717–6.75 while targeting resistance near 6.78–6.80, using tight risk controls. A breakout above 6.7814 would shift bias more decisively bullish, while a breakdown below 6.70 would signal weakening momentum and potential trend reversal toward lower consolidation levels as traders reassess positioning in response to key technical thresholds being tested.
